title: Staff iOS Engineer, App Builds
description:
Duolingo's mission is to develop the best education in the world and make it universally available. The company operates the world's most popular learning application, alongside offerings like the Duolingo English Test and new educational modules for math and music skills.

About the Role:
As an iOS engineer in the Client Platform Infrastructure Area, you'll develop infrastructure and tools enabling Duolingo's iOS development team to maintain speed and efficiency at scale across 70+ developers. The Client Builds and Infrastructure team focuses on evaluating and directing iOS build strategies, including Bazel exploration, modularization approaches, and CI pipeline optimization.

Responsibilities:
- Represent the team in architectural discussions and stakeholder conversations, bridging Client Platform and Product teams
- Create and maintain foundational application infrastructure building blocks
- Foster engineering excellence and mentor engineers at all experience levels
- Explore, prototype, and implement scaling tools such as Bazel migration, Tuist integration, and new platform capabilities

Required Qualifications:
- 6+ years iOS software engineering experience with 1-2+ years developing scalable production software
- Excellent command of engineering fundamentals
- Deep expertise in Swift and concurrency primitives
- Proficiency in native iOS development using standard tools and frameworks
- Ability to relocate to New York, NY
- Bachelor's degree required

Preferred Qualifications:
- Knowledge of iOS SDK performance tools and optimization techniques
- Experience with Bazel-based projects or large iOS/macOS projects
- Experience maintaining high-performance CI pipelines
- Deep understanding of testing best practices
